title: Wipro NLTH Mock Test 1
description: Simulates the Wipro National Level Test for Hiring: Aptitude, Verbal, and Technical sections.
questions: A shopkeeper bought an article for Rs. 450 and sold it for Rs. 540. What is his profit percentage?
What is the compound interest on Rs. 8000 at 10% per annum for 2 years, compounded annually?
A can complete a piece of work in 12 days and B can complete the same work in 18 days. If they work together, in how many days will the work be completed?
If A:B = 3:4 and B:C = 4:5, find A:B:C.
What is the smallest number that should be added to 1000 to make it exactly divisible by 13?
In how many ways can the letters of the word 'LEADER' be arranged?
What is the difference between a process and a thread?
What is virtual memory and what problem does it solve?
What are the four necessary conditions for a deadlock to occur?
What is the difference between TCP and UDP?
What is the difference between HTTP and HTTPS?
What does DNS stand for and what does it do?
What is the difference between INNER JOIN and LEFT JOIN?
What is the main goal of database normalization?
What is a database index and what is its tradeoff?
